# React Undraw

> Configurable React components for Undraw illustrations.

## Catalog (machine-readable)

- Full catalog: /react-undraw/illustrations.json
- Compact index: /react-undraw/illustrations.index.json
- Search: match `searchText` or `title` against user intent (e.g. "remote work", "empty state", "login", "new user" → add-user). `searchText` includes slug tokens plus generated aliases.
- Each entry has `name` (kebab-case slug) and `componentName` (PascalCase React export)

## Download SVG source files

No install required. After picking an illustration from the catalog:

- Site base: https://atb00ker.github.io/react-undraw
- URL template: {siteUrl}/illustrations/{name}.svg
- Each catalog entry includes `svgPath` (relative) and `svgUrl` (absolute, ready to fetch)
- Example: curl -LO https://atb00ker.github.io/react-undraw/illustrations/add-user.svg
- Downloaded SVGs are original Undraw source files (hardcoded #2563eb accent), not the React `{primaryColor}` variant

## Usage after picking an illustration

- Dynamic: import { UndrawIllustration } from "react-undraw"; <UndrawIllustration name="<name>" primaryColor="#2563eb" />
- Named (tree-shakeable): import { <componentName> } from "react-undraw"

## npm package

- Installed catalog: node_modules/react-undraw/dist/metadata.json (import via `react-undraw/metadata.json`)

## Human gallery

- /react-undraw/ — visual browser with search
- Deep links: ?q=<search> or ?illustration=<name>
